description: A customer has agreed to renew their annual contract.

nodes.task_description: Generate a renewal quote for the customer's existing plan.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates the renewal quote in the CRM.

nodes.task_description: Send the quote to the customer for signature.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends the document via an e-signature tool.

nodes.task_description: Once signed, process the renewal in the billing system and generate the invoice for the next term.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully renews the contract and issues the new invoice.
